task: Implement the harness plugin restructure: collapse the plugin MCP layer, move prepare/run/code surfaces to native Theorem MCP, add dark skills, and rewrite coordination around announce-over-room plus semantic overlap.

items.acceptance_criterion: Plugin manifests register one HTTP MCP server named `theorems-harness`; the local Node MCP and RustyRed proxy are gone.
items.verification: `python3 scripts/sync-plugin-manifests.py theorems-harness --check` passed; `.mcp.json`, `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`, and `.codex-plugin/plugin.json` point at the single remote HTTP server; `mcp/` is absent; stale-route grep found no `mcp/server`, `rustyred-theorem-proxy`, or `mcp__rustyred-thg__` references in live plugin docs/scripts/manifests.

items.acceptance_criterion: `harness_prepare` composes Ensemble selection plus native memory recall and returns a structured brief with rendered markdown.
items.verification: `cargo test -p rustyred-thg-mcp native_harness_prepare_composes_ensemble_and_memory_brief` passed; full `cargo test -p rustyred-thg-mcp` passed.

items.acceptance_criterion: Hook scripts use `harness_append_transition` / `harness_run` style native calls and no longer define or call Django helpers.
items.verification: `bash -n scripts/*.sh` passed; stale-route grep found no `theorem_post`, `theorem_get`, `THEOREM_CONTEXT_BASE_URL`, or `/api/v2/theseus` references in live plugin scripts/docs/manifests; `cargo test -p rustyred-thg-mcp native_harness_run_transitions_round_trip_through_mcp` passed.

items.acceptance_criterion: The native MCP advertises `compute_code` once for reads, advertises `code_ingest` for ingest/reindex/session writes, and keeps old `code_search` dispatch compatibility without advertising it.
items.verification: `cargo test -p rustyred-thg-mcp tools_list_exposes_read_only_graph_tools`, `chatgpt_flagged_tools_advertise_receipt_output_schemas`, `code_search_routes_named_harness_verb_to_app_affordance`, `compute_code_alias_routes_to_code_search_app_affordance`, `code_search_forwards_confirmation_from_tool_control_shapes`, and `code_search_write_operations_are_read_only_gated` passed; full MCP crate suite passed.

items.acceptance_criterion: The plugin includes the four dark skills and docs teach the native MCP/code split rather than the removed local server.
items.verification: `skills/graph-version/`, `skills/symbolic/`, `skills/dispatch/`, and `skills/browser-web/` are present; README, command docs, graph/code/research skills, and manifests were updated; stale-route grep passed.

items.acceptance_criterion: Coordination prompts and skills lead with announce-over-room and semantic overlap; patch/lease mechanics are documented as reconciliation, not ownership.
items.verification: `AGENTS.md`, `skills/harness-coordinate/SKILL.md`, `skills/theorems-harness/SKILL.md`, `commands/coordinate.md`, `commands/harness.md`, and `scripts/inject-harness-directives.sh` were updated; `bash -n scripts/*.sh` passed; `references/SHARED_CODE_CRDT_DECISION.md` documents the no-shared-code-CRDT boundary.
